Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 500}Are you ready to hear the voice of the Messiah and welcome the Salvation?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If I accept, I wonder what they'll tell me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It could be dangerous. What should I do...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 500}Time will not wait. Now's the time to take action...[n]{f 1 1}
